zh.lifeSummary: 當Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy於1441年10月7日出生在法國諾爾德利勒時，她的父親Amé D'Esnes26歲，母親Isabelle D'Ocoches18歲。她和Baudouin Delannoy至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於大約1511年4月22日享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy于1441年10月7日出生在法国諾爾德利勒时，她的父亲Amé D'Esnes26岁，母亲Isabelle D'Ocoches18岁。她和Baudouin Delannoy至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于大约1511年4月22日享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Michèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Michel ( see Michael ), also used in the English-speaking world (with or without the accent).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy was born on 7 October 1441, in Lille, Nord, France, her father, Amé D'Esnes, was 26 and her mother, Isabelle D'Ocoches, was 18. She had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Baudouin Delannoy. She died about 22 April 1511, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy est née le 7 octobre 1441, à Lille, Nord, France, son père, Amé D'Esnes, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabelle D'Ocoches, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Baudouin Delannoy. Elle est décédée environ 22 avril 1511, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy am 7. Oktober 1441 in Lille, Nord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amé D'Esnes 26 und ihre Mutter Isabelle D'Ocoches 18. Sie hatte mit Baudouin Delannoy mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 22. April 1511 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy è nata il il 7 ottobre 1441 nel Lille, Nord, Francia, sua padre, Amé D'Esnes, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabelle D'Ocoches, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Baudouin Delannoy. Morì circa 22 aprile 1511, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Michèle d’Esne de Cauroyが1441年10月7日にフランスノードリルで生まれた時，父Amé D'Esnesは26歳，母Isabelle D'Ocochesは18歳であった。彼女はBaudouin Delannoyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1511年4月22日に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy(이)가 1441년 10월 7일 프랑스 노르드 릴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amé D'Esnes(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle D'Ocoches(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Baudouin Delannoy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1511년 4월 22일 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.07 Oct 1441–environ 22 avril 1511: 1441 оны Аравдугаар сарын 7–ойролцоогоор 1511 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 22

pt.07 Oct 1441–environ 22 avril 1511: 7 de outubro de 1441–aproximadamente 22 de abril de 1511
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1441, em Lille, Nord, França, seu pai, Amé D'Esnes, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle D'Ocoches, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Baudouin Delannoy. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 22 de abril de 1511, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy родилась 7 октября 1441 г. в местности лилл, норд, Франция, её отцу по имени Amé D'Esnes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle D'Ocoches, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Baudouin Delannoy. Она умерла около 22 апреля 1511 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.07 Oct 1441–environ 22 avril 1511: 7 de octubre de 1441–aproximadamente 22 de abril de 1511
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michèle d’Esne de Cauroy nació el 7 de octubre de 1441, en Lille, Nord, Francia, su papá, Amé D'Esnes, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabelle D'Ocoches, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas con Baudouin Delannoy. Murió aproximadamente 22 de abril de 1511, a la edad de 69 años.
